experiment: T1 iter33-C diverse-base-learner chain ensemble LOCKBOX

formula.experiment: T1 iter33-C — diverse-base-learner chain ensemble {LGB, XGB-hist, ExtraTrees}

model_ensemble: RegressorChain(XGBRegressor hist, 500 trees, lr=0.05, depth=4, min_child_weight=5)
stage2.ensemble_method: average chain-output across bases per fold per seed
stage2.decorrelation_argument: F66 NULL: within-LGB chain-order avg has frac>0=0.318 (highly correlated). Different base learners (gradient boosting / hist boosting / random splits) produce decorrelated trees by construction → real variance reduction.

eval.headline_metric: CCC of mean-of-seed predictions vs y_t1
eval.comparator_iter5_direct_loocv: computed live in same SID-aligned LOOCV

lockbox_rules: ONE pre-registered config. ONE LOOCV run.
Headline = CCC of mean-of-3-seed preds (each seed averages 3 base learners).
Pass-canonical: paired-bootstrap (n=5000) vs iter5-direct frac>0 ≥ 0.95 AND headline > 0.6550.

eval_protocol: LOOCV (n=94) on T1 cohort. Stage-1 Ridge on H&Y + cv_yrs + cv_sex + cv_dbs. Stage-2 RegressorChain V1_random with 3 base learners {LGB, XGB-hist, ExtraTrees}; chain-output OOFs averaged per fold. 3-seed mean preds = headline.
